---
title: "New Home on Mastodon"
description: "Joining @BenjaminHan@sigmoid.social — thank you to The Gradient for hosting the community."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-11-06"
categories: [Mastodon, social media, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Benjamin Han on sigmoid.social. Image from [sigmoid.social](https://sigmoid.social/@BenjaminHan).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

My new home @ Mastodon -- thank you so much The Gradient for hosting the community!

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_benjamin-han-benjaminhansigmoidsocial-activity-6995134774436646912-Yt_P).*
